reviews.title: Don't go there
reviews.text: I book a room for roughly usd300/day for 2 days. It is very far north end of Mactan and you need to pass very dirty and unpleasend local area that you would not feel comfortable at all to walk through. The property is still under construction and you have a good chance to have your room in front or near yo construction site. As soon as I entered the room, I found dozens of ants moving around on floor and desk underneath TV and it did not take long to find another kind of insect which looks even worse than ant. I straight went down to the check in counter and asked my room changed. The staff changed my room but I was asked to stay in the initial room until the inspector to come up to check and confirm the room had such problem before I could move to the new room. Problem did not end that in the restroom, I found two dirty towels (stains were easily seen) and there was wood powder falling from somewhere down to restroom floors. I called a taxi from the lobby and I was told to wait 20-30 minuites, I waited over 30 mins and then asked if the taxi was on the way. She walked to bell desk and came to me saying that there were 3 more team in fron of me. I turned up to bell desk and asked to see the waiting list, It was true that 3 more team were in front, but somehow we were the last on the list. All those teams in front of us should be actually behind us. Check ot time is 12 and there was a long queue, only 2 staffs were serving you should expect to queue up for 30-40 mins if you check out after 11:30. There is no chance I stay at Sheraton mactan. It was one of the worst 5star bad experiences in my life.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Courtyard view

The property is showing signs of wear (possibly from the typhoon in November). There’s limited poolside seating meaning you need to be up early to get a spot. It seemed like many thing you take for granted at a quality hotel were missing. 

There are probably better alternatives available to stay at.

It would be preferable if the toilet and shower is in one place.  Furthermore, we got a problem or mistake of double booking of hotel stay  due to misunderstanding of booking policy. We tried to ask appeal for exception  to cancellation policy from the hotel despite the escalations and explanation, they did not give us a      fair refund for 3 rooms instead charged us for 1 room for penalty. We were hoping they will give us fair refund or even just gave us lesser penalty since it was before christmas time, a season or celebration of happiness. reviews.title: So many other better resorts nearby
reviews.text: I have been to a couple of resorts in Mactan Cebu (Crimson, JPark, The Reef, Shangrila, Dusit Thani), I rate Sheraton at the bottom of my list, unfortunately. Things that were memorable for me: Check-in was a bit slow, had to wait for around 20mins. Elevators were not airconditioned. Room keycard didnt read well when opening the door, door was also cluncky (had to push really hard to open). There was a smell on the shower (sewage-like). Pools were crowded (two pools). Service was actually slow too at their restaurant and when we were asking for additional towels (since we added one person per room in the booking). I will not personally go back to this resort.

reviews.title: Cinco cien & Buhi bar team
reviews.text: Thanks to Wendy and night shift team of Cinco cien restau who provided us with excellent sevice! And ofcourse the staffs from Buhi Bar <3 thanks for making our bday extra memorable!!! For the front office team, please train your team mbrs especially supervisors with handling concerns/complaint. They were charging us for the extra person after checkin and called us multiple times in our room as their staff did not inform us with extra person charge at the desk. I understand that the agent who handled our checkin was still on training however they called us multiple times 5-10mins after cin in our room without being apologetic of what transpired.  Also, we were asking for late checkout for free of 2pm due to delayed flight however they did not acknowledge our request even tho they were aware of what happened during checkin. That was the only thing that we needed as compensation but front office didn’t provided us with the free late checkout for 2 rooms & only gave 1 room for 1pm lco. Hahaha thank you

reviews.title: Instead of a relaxing getaway, our stay felt overshadowed by poor hospitality and unnecessary scrutiny.
reviews.positives: The room is large and the pool is nice.
reviews.negatives:
The staff lacked hospitality during our stay. I’ve visited several resorts in Cebu, but this was my family’s first time at Sheraton. We had barely arrived in our room when we immediately received a call questioning why we were a group of four, after being flagged by security. They even asked when my sister would be leaving the property.

While we appreciated that they eventually allowed my sister to stay for an additional fee, the manner in which it was raised could have been more courteous and considerate. Unfortunately, the constant questioning didn’t stop there. During breakfast, we were once again asked why we were four guests and if we had already paid. It makes me wonder — is there no proper communication or endorsement between the staff?

Overall, the experience felt less like a warm welcome and more like being monitored, which was disappointing. For this reason, I would not consider staying here again.

reviews.title: Quite Average
reviews.text: The property is visibly old. The breakfast spread was the same everyday which was monotonous for a beach resort stay of 5 nights.  As the location being secluded there were no options outside and nearby.  The beach and its sand were full of rocks and not the soft white sands. The extra bed was riddled with bed bugs  despite changing beds. My daughters were bitten everywhere. The staff were friendly and helpful nonetheless. Overall it was average for a 5 Star hotel in a $1k/night room.

reviews.title: Serious Hygiene Issue – Few Cockroaches Found Around the Bed
reviews.text:
We stayed at Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort for three nights and were initially pleased with the overall atmosphere and facilities. During our stay, we ordered room service twice and dined at Dip Restaurant twice, which reflects that we genuinely appreciated the experience.

However, on our final night in the ocean view room, we discovered five cockroaches around the bed area and two more in the bathroom — a total of seven cockroaches inside the guest room. Finding insects, especially around the bed, is a serious hygiene concern and completely unacceptable at this level of hotel.

It was our last evening, and we had planned to end our trip in a relaxed and memorable way. Unfortunately, this incident entirely disrupted the atmosphere and significantly affected our overall experience. For a resort of this standard and price range, this was both shocking and deeply disappointing.

To their credit, management later approved a refund for one night, which we appreciate. Nevertheless, we sincerely hope the hotel takes stronger preventive measures to ensure such hygiene issues do not happen again in guest rooms.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Ocean View, Balcony

reviews.title: Underwhelming beach resort experience
reviews.text:
For the price you pay, experience is not at par with similar 5 star hotels overseas. Pool is too small in relation to the hotel occupancy, that we felt it was too crowded with all the kids/families using the facilities. Can’t enjoy some peaceful time at the pool. Hotel facilities were good, room was spacious and people were nice.  Food was so-so and way overpriced for what they are. Although they had USDA beef, the cut served for their steak was not from a good part of the beef, noting we are used to Australian beef.  In room dining was good but food could be better.  Buffet breakfast at 5 Cien has good selection for someone missing a taste of Cebu/Filipino food. The local delicacies like suman, sticky rice were prepared well in comparison to all other hotels we stayed at during this trip.  Liked that their gym is open 24/7.  Spa facilities and staff were good but we had better massages somewhere else. 
Overall, experience could really be better if they had better pool facilities, separating one for adults and children and at least 5ft deep rather than 4.

reviews.negatives: I would have rated all perfect ratings except for one big problem.   There are green led strobe lights above the bed.  Every five seconds a bright green flash fills the room, and even penetrates my eyelids.   Sleeping was not at easy at this place and I will not be back.  I had to turn the a/c on high and get the room cold enough to hide under the blankets.  This is a huge problem and when I told staff they all said they heard this before. I know no management staff has never had to endure a night under one of these flashing bright lights, or otherwise the problem would be rectified.  I would advise to avoid this property if you value restful sleep.

reviews.title: It was great, but a bit disappointing..
reviews.text:
Mactan Sheraton 2025.09.30~2025.10.03
During my 7-night trip, I stayed at Shangri-La first before moving to Sheraton.
As soon as I arrived at Sheraton, I was very satisfied with the modern interior and clean design.
I immediately attached the shower filter and took a shower, and unlike at Shangri-La, the filter was very clean.
On the first night, we had to evacuate due to a sudden earthquake, and the staff's dedicated response was truly impressive.
We evacuated to an outdoor parking lot, but they rescued guests risking their lives and continuously moved chairs and sunbeds outside, asking guests to sit down. I was really grateful for their additional efforts such as providing bread and towels for the long evacuation.
However, after the situation calmed down and I went back to my room, there were too many bugs in the room.
I don't know why. It seemed like winged insects were walking around, with just their bodies moving without their wings. In the bed, bathroom, etc.
I requested to change rooms, and they moved me quickly.
I woke up and found bugs in the bathroom again in the morning.
I moved rooms again and that one was fine.
The facilities are clean, but I don't understand why there are so many bugs...
From other reviews, it seems like the toilet holes were all blocked, so the bugs came out.
And breakfast was personally not great for me. I also bought dinner at the buffet, but it was not good...ㅠ
The pizza at Bubbi? Buba? cave was also personally not good.
The staff is friendly, the facilities are clean, the water is good, and the pool and beach are nice.
It would be a great place if the food could be improved.

reviews.title: Beautiful Resort, But Falls Short of the True Sheraton Experience
reviews.text:
Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort presents itself as a gathering place that encourages people to connect with colleagues, friends, and fellow travelers, and as a guest, I felt that this promise was only partially fulfilled. The resort is visually impressive, with well designed common areas, a spacious room, and plenty of spaces meant for relaxation and socializing. The overall atmosphere is calm and inviting, making it easy to spend time with the people you came with.

The staff deserve special mention as they were consistently warm, attentive, and professional throughout our stay. Their hospitality made interactions pleasant and helped create a welcoming environment, which is an important part of any resort experience.

However, the value for money was a major letdown. We paid almost 20k pesos for a one night stay, and for that price, the experience felt underwhelming. The dining experience at 5 Cien, in particular, did not meet expectations. We spent almost 6k pesos for dinner for two, yet the food selection was limited and lacking. The sushi section was disappointing, with no sashimi and overall quality that did not justify the cost. For the same price, other buffet options like Vikings offer far better value and variety. Because of this, dining did not become a space for meaningful gathering or connection, which is essential to the Sheraton brand promise.

Another factor that affected the experience was the stay duration. Check in is at 3pm and checkout is at 12nn, giving only about 21 hours to enjoy the resort. Compared to other hotels that allow earlier check in, this made the stay feel rushed, especially considering the premium price.

Overall, Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort has strong points in terms of design, service, and ambiance, but it falls short when it comes to value, dining, and fully delivering on the idea of being a true gathering place. I would rate this experience a 6 out of 10. It was decent, but not something I would rush to book again.

reviews.title: If you come to Cebu, I definitely recommend it :)
reviews.text:
3 nights and 5 days in Cebu ✈️ (I stayed for 2 nights!)
In conclusion, it was an amazing stay ⭐︎!!
After researching various travel sites, social media, and reviews, I decided based on the infinity pool, cleanliness, and the quality of the facilities ☑︎
Below, I hope this serves as a wonderful reference for your Cebu trip!

☆Good 

"About the pool"
Stylish and fantastic! Both the sunrise and sunset create a wonderful atmosphere. Beach towels can be borrowed by the poolside!
During my stay, there were events like bingo games, pool exercises, and free ice cream ♡ Kids will have a great time too! *There is also a kids' pool.

"Food"
I booked with breakfast only! It was a great decision ◎ The buffet was substantial!!
Everything was delicious, and the lineup changed a bit each day, so I didn’t get bored. With a variety of international dishes, it's recommended even for those with picky tastes. I was happy to find natto and miso soup! LOL
I also ordered room service, and it was delicious ♡ The prices were reasonable, and I enjoyed cocktails, garlic shrimp pasta, and steak.

"Staff"
Everyone was cheerful, kind, and cute! LOL
There were no particular troubles.

"Guest room"
The room I stayed in was a twin room.
It was very spacious, and the amenities provided were the basic ones you'd find in Japanese hotels! It was clean and relaxing.

★Not good
Only the location!
However, we planned to stay in the city center on the first day to enjoy the city and to have a relaxing stay at the Sheraton on days 2 and 3, so I have no complaints :) 
Taking a taxi is essential for traveling.
*The surrounding area is said to have poor safety.
It takes about an hour to get to the city center!

Wishing you a wonderful stay ☆

reviews.title: I am very satisfied.
reviews.text:
The facilities and the swimming pool are good. You can also snorkel at the beach in front of the pool, and they rent equipment by the hour, but it would be better to prepare in advance (life jackets are available for free rental).

If you go beyond the breakwater, which is not directly in front of the beach, the water gets deeper and you can see a lot of fish.

The facilities are very clean, and there's a space with a bathtub. However, since it's located a bit far away, it might be inconvenient for traveling to the city, so it would be good for those who prefer to stay within the facility as much as possible.

Breakfast is free for my child who is in the 3rd grade, and the menu is similar to other places. When ordering an omelet, you need to remember your table number and tell them, and you have to go find it by saying your table number to collect it. Personally, I like bacon, but it tends to be served very hard.

For dinner, two adults ordered separate dishes at the restaurant, and my child had the buffet, which costs half the price of an adult. If both adults go for the buffet, the child eats for free (I think it was said that one adult also allows the child to eat for free, but I’m not entirely sure).

The swimming pool is beautiful, and Block D is very famous among Koreans, so it's said that many Koreans prefer Block D. It would be good to send an email in advance to request it.

In any case, everything was very satisfactory except for the price at this hotel.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Ocean View, Balcony

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room condition was clean and good, and all the staff were friendly. I asked if there was a band-aid since I got slightly cut, and a paramedic came over personally to help, which I was very grateful for. They provide snorkeling gear for rent at the private beach, but I didn't see any fish, lol. The outdoor yoga class in the evening was really wonderful; it was one of the most memorable moments of this trip. It's a bit remote, so it's hard to get around without Grab. When I checked out, I couldn't get a Grab, so I took a taxi called by the hotel, but they really tried to charge me an outrageous fare, so I recommend using Grab even if it takes some waiting. The breakfast wasn't very satisfying for me and my party, who have a typical Korean palate, so that was a bit disappointing! Still, we had a great time relaxing~

reviews.title: An unforgettable family experience
reviews.text:
Our stay at Sheraton was absolutely wonderful. What stood out the most was the kindness and warmth of the staff — always friendly, helpful, and genuinely welcoming. They made us feel at home from the very beginning.
It was also the perfect place for a family getaway. My daughter loved the pool and the beach so much that we didn’t even feel the need to go anywhere else! She was truly happy just enjoying the water and playing by the shore. 
The breakfast buffet was also excellent — delicious, varied, and a great way to start the day. The only small suggestion would be to offer natural juices without added sugar, which would make the experience even better.
You can feel the love and attention the hotel puts into every detail. We will definitely come back!

Additionally, the provision of various family-friendly activities added an extra layer of enjoyment to our stay, making it a memorable experience for all members of our group.

In conclusion, I extend my heartfelt appreciation for the outstanding hospitality extended to me and my companions during our time at your hotel. Please convey my gratitude to your dedicated team members for their commendable efforts in ensuring a pleasant stay for all guests.

The food needs improvement especially the dinner buffet which cost us 3k+ per pax. We have eaten much tastier food (lechon and seafoods) in Cebu restaurants and they were far more affordable.

Over all, we had a fun family bonding by spending overnight at Sheraton Mactan.

reviews.title: It is a luxury resort.
reviews.text:
I visited for my father's 60th birthday trip, and it was great! We had breakfast, went swimming, and my father, who loves water, had a blast going back and forth between the sea and the pool. In the afternoon, we went out for a tour, but he mentioned that it would have been nice to just enjoy the resort all day as I had initially suggested. 
If possible, it would have been good to book an ocean view, but I also found the garden view quite relaxing and nice. (One side of the view is under construction right now.) 
I woke up early and took my knitting to the sunbed, enjoying the view and a refreshing drink, which was very healing. 
However, when I opened and closed the door, a lovebug, something the size of a pinky finger or a cockroach, came in, which was quite a shock... But apart from that one, I didn't see any others, and all the bedding, towels, etc., were very clean!

It took a day, but I was satisfied with the view from the new room, which met my expectations.

The bathroom was completely separate, spacious enough for the whole family to use without any inconvenience.

There are two swimming pools and a private beach, so we had plenty of fun playing in the water, and I also enjoyed participating in the pool aerobics around 10 o'clock.

The club sandwich was really delicious, and I had it twice during our stay.

I plan to visit again when my child is a bit older.

reviews.title: Schöne Anlage und freundliches Personal, aber teuer und eingeschränkte Raucherbereiche.
reviews.positives: Positiv hervorzuheben sind das sehr zuvorkommende und freundliche Personal, die schönen Zimmer mit toller Aussicht sowie die sehr schöne Poolanlage.
reviews.negatives:
Die Preise im Resort selbst sind sehr überteuert. Leider verfügen die meisten Restaurants fast ausschließlich über Innenplätze, die zudem viel zu stark klimatisiert sind und dadurch sehr ungemütlich wirken.

Das Meer vor dem Resort ist sehr steinig und der Strand eher klein. Das Frühstück war in Ordnung, aber nicht herausragend – es ist deutlich mehr auf asiatische Gäste ausgerichtet, mit nur wenigen europäischen Optionen, und zudem sehr überfüllt.

Der größte Minuspunkt war für mich die Raucherregelung. In diesem sehr großen Resort gibt es nur einen einzigen Raucherbereich, der nicht überdacht ist. Bei Regen wird man dort komplett nass. Rauchen ist im gesamten Resort sowie sogar auf dem Balkon verboten. Als Raucher fühlt man sich dadurch klar benachteiligt, was für mich ein entscheidender Grund ist, dieses Resort nicht erneut zu besuchen. Wünschenswert wären mehrere überdachte Raucherlounges mit Sitzmöglichkeiten.

reviews.title: I highly recommend Sheraton for homes with babies.
reviews.text:
Reasons for recommendation
1. Excellent room condition. Even with early check-in, the room condition was top-notch, and the baby crib I requested was already prepared, which allowed me to comfortably settle down the baby and get ready. Although the floor cleaning was a bit lacking, the overall room condition was excellent.
2. All the staff were friendly and attentive. I requested mango for breakfast, but they said it was out of stock. However, as I was leaving, one of the staff members said that mango had just arrived and would send it to my room. It made me feel really good, and the mango was absolutely delicious.
3. The swimming pool was really nice, and the safety guards kept a close watch on the kids, allowing them to play safely.
4. The Buhi Cave Bar cocktails were worth every penny; they were incredibly good. The only downside I noticed was the distance from the main area.

reviews.positives:
Schöner Resort-Urlaub, aber Strand und Lage haben Einschränkungen

Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt im Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort genossen. Das Personal war sehr freundlich, die Zimmer sauber und komfortabel. Das Frühstück bietet eine große Auswahl, vor allem an asiatischen und koreanischen Speisen, allerdings nur im extrem klimatisierten Innenbereich und nicht im Aussenbereich

Der Strand ist leider etwas steinig, und es gibt nicht genug Liegen, besonders an volleren Tagen. Wer sich viel Sonne und Sand wünscht, könnte enttäuscht sein. Die Lage ist ruhig, aber auch etwas abgelegen – Restaurants oder Bars in der Nähe gibt es kaum, ein Taxi ist nötig, um auswärts essen zu gehen.

Insgesamt ein schönes Resort für einen ruhigen Aufenthalt, wer jedoch idealen Sandstrand oder unmittelbare Restaurantmöglichkeiten sucht, sollte dies berücksichtigen.

Bewertung: ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

reviews.title: Great people + great food
reviews.text:
I was having second thoughts on this booking because of the reviews but went ahead anyway.

The resort is on the far side of Punta Engaño thus making it a bit of a hassle to go out BUT the hotel serves really good food, and plenty of activities for everyone to enjoy. The most important for us would be the staff. They were really warm and attentive, never met a single one who didn’t greet us during encounters in the hotel premises. There were instances when requests were not readily granted but they always made sure to deliver. They were very thoughtful and some even call you by your name.😊

The pool side was full most of the time so make sure to go early and reserve a chair. There were basketball rings set up on both pools that my kids enjoyed a lot. They also served popsicles or fresh fruits by the pool for free. There was even a daily pool zumba session. As I’ve mentioned, there were plenty of activities for both kids and adults to enjoy all throughout the day. 

Breakfast spread was always sumptuous, with real magtataho. Staff of 5 Cien were very warm and accommodating.

Our best meal though was in Dip, the Japanese-Peruvian restaurant. Everything we ordered was delectable, especially the crispy pork belly.👌 

Even though the beach is very rocky, I would still go back to this hotel for the good food and the excellent service of the staff. 

Special shoutout to Paolo (gym), Wilbert (poolside), Babie Jean (5 Cien).

* Stayed in a double courtyard view room which was perfect for 4 people.

reviews.title: RELAXING
reviews.text:
My experience at Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort was exceptional. From start to finish, I felt that I truly got the value of my money. The resort offered a perfect blend of luxury and relaxation, making it an unforgettable stay.

The ambiance of the resort was incredibly calming, with stunning views and well-maintained facilities contributing to the overall serene atmosphere. Whether lounging by the pool or strolling along the pristine beach, every moment felt like a retreat from the hustle and bustle of daily life.

The staff at Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort were attentive and accommodating, ensuring that all my needs were met with a warm and friendly demeanor. From check-in to check-out, the service was impeccable, adding to the overall enjoyment of my stay.

Overall, I left Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort feeling rejuvenated and relaxed, knowing that I had experienced true value for my money. I would highly recommend this resort to anyone seeking a luxurious and tranquil getaway.

reviews.negatives: Purtroppo in Filippine confondono lo Svapo con le sigarette. In altre parole con il divieto del fumo in pubblico si costringe il fumatore in una specifica area fumo collocata zona piscine e adiacente al ristorante delle piscine che funziona anche la sera. Non si fuma in camera ne nel terrazzo esterno della camera. Quindi sole o pioggia e a qualsiasi ora bisogna andare li. Seppure concordo, io non sono più fumatore da circa 6 anni. Uso una macchina che contiene liquidi, privi di nicotina e che emette solo Vapore. NON FUMO. Ho provato a spiegare ma non cè stato nulla da fare. Ho dovuto quindi subire fumo passivo, pur avendo smesso da 6 anni di fumare. Il mio consiglio? creare come per esempio visto in aereoporto a Mactan due aree separate per fumatori e Svapatori.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text:
We had a great stay at Sheraton Mactan. It is a perfect place for an easy getaway and a quick breather from the usual routine.

The heated pool was a highlight, especially for relaxing at any time of the day. The beach is also really nice, particularly early in the morning when the tide is high. It feels peaceful and refreshing.

The breakfast buffet offers a wide selection, so there is something for everyone to enjoy. The room was spacious, clean, and had a really pleasant scent, which made the stay even more comfortable.

Overall, it is a great spot if you are looking to unwind and recharge.

reviews.title: Sheraton Mactan Cebu has been nothing short of amazing! Kudos to the whole team’
reviews.text:
I am not the type to easily give commendation but I know when to give credit when credit is due. Our experience with Sheraton Mactan has been nothing short of amazing! 

I wanted to personally thank Renante Selgas ("Renz"), Robert Ibanez, and the whole Sheraton Mactan team for turning our stay around. While we encountered an initial issue, the swift and professional response truly exceeded our expectations. 

The team of Renz and Robert went above and beyond to make things right, demonstrating genuine care. They handled all my concerns with such grace and efficiency that it made our stay memorable. 

Renz and Robert listened, acted, and went the extra mile to ensure we were comfortable and even upgraded us to a Junior Suite accommodation and dinner for 3 pax for the entire duration of our stay. Renz even sent us a wine and cheese platter to our room just 5 minutes after dinner, which was a fantastic example of professional hospitality.

When we went down for dinner earlier, the whole Sheraton Mactan team was very attentive to our needs, ensuring that napkins were placed on our laps, refreshments were offered, and all the food we wanted to eat was available. Special shoutout to the head water named Ramil for being extra gracious and attentive all throughout our stay. I even asked to take a picture with him because he was so warm and welcoming!

It’s clear this team values customer experience above all else—we will definitely be back!!

reviews.title: Top notch Hospitality
reviews.text:
Staying at Sheraton Mactan was more like coming home than checking into a hotel. From the moment we stepped foot at Sheraton, every single staff member made us feel most welcomed with an abundance of warmth and care. You can literally sense their hospitality is coming from the heart. Everyone was sporting their famous smiles, and help was definitely never far away before we asked.
However, what really stood out was how kid-friendly this resort really was! The staff were so patient and kind with our children that they made them feel just as important as everyone else in the group! Needless to say, we had no problems enjoying our stay at this hotel by just relaxing!
At the Sheraton Mactan, it is not merely a wonderful place to stay, it is a place where we feel valued, remembered, and cared for. Finding a place like this, which feels like a second home, is hard to find, but we did find one indeed.

reviews.title: Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort
reviews.text: The resort's facilities are very well-equipped, making it perfect for a hotel vacation. Above all, the breakfast was delicious, and I was satisfied with the friendly staff and clean room conditions! In particular, we booked a double bed room and thought the actual size of the bed would be a super single, but it was about a double, so it was spacious and comfortable to sleep in. I heard that the water quality was poor, so I brought a shower filter, but it turned out to be unnecessary as the water in Building B where I stayed was clean. I definitely want to use this place again on my next visit to Cebu.

reviews.title: Amazing Stay — Will Definitely Return
reviews.text:
Our stay at Sheraton Cebu Mactan Resort was truly amazing. We enjoyed the beautiful beach and pool, as well as the various activities offered—standing paddle boarding was definitely a highlight. The food at Buhi Cave Bar and 5 Cien was excellent and memorable. The Cave Bar was truly unique, wonderful experience and a piece of art. Unfortunately, we didn’t get the chance to try Dip Restaurant, but it’s something we look forward to on our next visit.

The staff were warm, friendly, and very approachable—from the front desk until we left. While Netflix was not available, the internet connection was reliable. Overall, it was a great experience, and we will definitely return.

reviews.title: best forever
reviews.text: I visited last year and was satisfied with the hygiene and the service, so this is my second visit. One of my companions suddenly developed severe headaches and stomachaches while swimming, so I asked the hotel staff if I could get some headache medicine, and they said they would send a nurse if it was okay, so I even received a check-up and got the medicine. I was really grateful, and they even prepared emergency medication for us. The next morning, before breakfast, they called me to make sure I had my blood pressure checked, so I got my blood pressure measured and received more medicine. I really appreciate how kind they are! The bed is comfortable, and the facilities are great!

reviews.title: Best holiday resort in Cebu
reviews.text:
First impression is always crucial in creating a lasting & memorable experience. This hotel does first impression magnificently especially during check in with the infinite pool as a backdrop & private beach in the background. Welcome drinks & snacks were spot on & the room was nothing short of spectacular.  
This resort is a place you can stay for several days & do not feel the need to step out at all. The facilities offers a great deal of facilities from multi layer pool, water sport, pool aerobics, private beach with phenomenal view & in door activities as well such as table tennis, badminton, etc. 
One of the highlight of the stay have to be the many different restaurants from Dip, Buhi, In Room Dining, & the all day dining is my personal favourite as I enjoy breakfast there every morning. 
Lastly, the best part about the hotel is the 5 star service whether it be from the pool attendant, room service, restaurant staff, & front desk assistant are pushing out their best red carpet service to greet & serve you like you’re part of the family.

reviews.title: Please refer to the authentic review of a Korean who stayed for 3 nights.
reviews.text:
1. Location: It is located on the outskirts of Mactan, so you will have to use a taxi to get around. The location itself is not particularly accessible.

2. Facilities: It is really, really, really clean and luxurious. Even in a courtyard view room, the view of the resort pool and buildings through the balcony is great, and the pool is also very pretty and well-maintained. You can see the management of the cave bar and private beach frequently. The cleanliness of the restaurant and bar is excellent, and visually, it is outstanding. (No matter where you take a picture of the resort pool, you will get an amazing shot.)

3. Room condition: Starting from the scent when you open the door to the cleanliness of the bathroom, it is better maintained than hotels I stayed at in Korea. I think I was even more satisfied than when I stayed at Signiel, truly.

4. Breakfast: The menu changes slightly every day, and there are events like a person walking around with soft tofu in a pot serving it directly. Overall, the menu is a bit salty, but I enjoyed it a lot, and on days when I couldn't have breakfast due to early tours like the Oslob tour, they packed a lunch for me... I was touched.

5. Service: It was truly excellent. Every staff member I encountered (even those just carrying luggage) greeted me with a smile. At the resort pool, free aqua aerobics/yoga classes were held at designated times daily, and the satisfaction of other guests present seemed very high. The instructor was very cheerful and lively, and the staff distributed free fruit skewers (watermelon and pineapple) to those sitting on the sunbeds...

6. Final: I am willing to go to Cebu again just to visit this resort, and I am so sad that I cannot spread this satisfying review everywhere as I am not a blogger. By the way, I went with my parents, and they were very satisfied as well. Make sure to make a reservation!!
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Courtyard view

reviews.title: 絕對值得安排來放鬆耍廢
reviews.positives:
地點雖然很偏僻，但是基本上待在飯店就可以完全不用離開。
有私人海灘可以浮潛，如果有自己的面鏡呼吸管，就不用花錢參加他們的活動（很貴），救生衣是免費的，建議可以跟服務人員領取，躺在沙攤上的躺椅特別舒服！
晚餐吃 DIP，海鮮燉飯（jumbo shrimp）永生難忘的好吃，調酒也表現得很不錯（sake）
晚點再去 BUHI 酒吧，店員推薦的絕對超好喝！微風徐徐的很舒服～～
回房間泡熱水澡，有夠舒適～～
接著隔天的早餐，到 5 cien 用餐，種類多到絕對吃不到每一樣，最好安排一個多小時用餐，否則會吃太撐 XD
吃飽後，回房間休息一下，換上泳衣去泳池玩水～就算只是泡一下水也是很放鬆！
服務人員看到都會打招呼非常親切～
房內還有附贈掛耳包咖啡～
陽台還可以曬衣服（有曬衣架）跟 chill 的椅子（但空間太擠）
reviews.negatives:
電梯的樓層不直覺，所以常常按錯電梯。
廁所沒有垃圾桶，床附近沒有衛生紙，
房間內總共有兩個椅子，陽台有一個椅子，但陽台的是最好坐的～

reviews.text:
수영은 야간에 물이 따뜻해서 온수풀 같이 늦게까지 놀 수도 있고 바다에도 물고기가 많아서 한번 들어가면 2시간 후딱 갑니다

reviews.title: 아이들이 어리다면 강추해요 :)

reviews.title: Superb hospitality! 👍🏼😍
reviews.text:
I’d like to start this review with all the great things that totally swept me off my feet! 👍🏼

- Their front desk officer (Ms Bianca) is very responsive to my online emails prior to the check in date.
-  Upon checking in, the lady at the front desk (forgot her name) offered me a complimentary late check out of 2pm instead of 12noon.
- The warm greetings of the staff upon arrival is very evident, plus the free welcome drinks (mango juice).
- They delivered birthday sweets to our room. 
- The guest service was kind enough to provide my kids an extra bed for free! 😂
- They have a seahorse mascot with matching dance prod during breakfast of the guests.
- They provided some treats (candies) to the kids of the guests.
- They have an in-house Taho boy during breakfast.
- They have great breakfast buffet spread too.
- Their recreation staff conducted a hydro aerobic/zumba by the pool for the guests to enjoy.
- There are a lot of board games and ball games to enjoy too within the play area.
- The cleanliness of the entire vicinity is also very evident.


To top it off, all their staff are very pleasant and greets all the guests with a matching bow and hand on the chest! ❤️ We loved our experience at this hotel and is already looking forward to our next staycation.


Many thanks, Team Sheraton Mactan for the memorable accommodation. It was all greatly appreciated and made my advance birthday celeb a great experience!

reviews.title: A hotel with a heart ☺️
reviews.text:
I chose this hotel to celebrate the 70th birthday of my Mom, and it exceeded every expectation. From the moment we checked in, the staff made us feel like VIPs. The front desk team had noted our special occasion in advance and surprised my Mom with a handwritten card,  a small cake and a bottle of wine waiting in the room — a small touch that made a big impression.

The room itself was spacious, spotlessly clean, and had a stunning view. The bed was incredibly comfortable, and the bathroom felt like a personal spa. 

When the 5.1 magnitude earthquake hit Cebu last April 6, 2026, they offered us to transfer in the lower floor (lobby level) from 11th floor. I appreciated it so much because its so hard to move fast when you have a senior citizen with you. 

If you’re planning a special occasion (or just a staycation), I cannot recommend this hotel enough. They truly go the extra mile to make you feel celebrated. We will absolutely be back for our next milestone.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Courtyard view

reviews.title: Amazing Stay with Restful Vibes
reviews.text: Sheraton offers amazing amenities and a delightful breakfast experience, especially with their mascot Shera performing every morning, it's a fun treat. The resort is surrounded by beautiful greenery, gardens, and just a beautiful sunset that makes you feel like you're not in the Philippines. It's a prime location, near a ton of restaurants and massage areas. Super enjoyable stay and would definitely come back.
